samples.xml_description:
Implement an unsigned 8-bit multiplier using pipelining processing. Clock signal for synchronization. Active-low reset signal. Input enable signal for multiplication. Multiplicand input. Multiplier input. Output enable signal for multiplication. Product output. 8 16 Register to store the multiplication enable signal. Register to store the multiplicand input. Register to store the multiplier input. Register to store the partial sums. Register to store the final product. Wire to store the temporary partial products. Implement an unsigned 8-bit multiplier using pipelining processing.

Reset the registers.

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin if (!rst_n) begin mul_en_out_reg <= 2'b0; mul_a_reg <= 8'b0; mul_b_reg <= 8'b0; sum <= 16'b0; mul_out_reg <= 16'b0; end end

Update the multiplication enable signal.

always @(posedge clk) begin mul_en_out_reg <= {mul_en_out_reg[0], mul_en_in}; end

Update the multiplicand and multiplier registers.

always @(posedge clk) begin if (mul_en_in) begin mul_a_reg <= mul_a; mul_b_reg <= mul_b; end end

Generate the partial products.

assign temp[0] = mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[0]}}; assign temp[1] = mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[1]}}; assign temp[2] = mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[2]}}; assign temp[3] = mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[3]}}; assign temp[4] = mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[4]}}; assign temp[5] = mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[5]}}; assign temp[6] = mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[6]}}; assign temp[7] = mul_a_reg & {8{mul_b_reg[7]}};

Calculate the partial sums.

always @(posedge clk) begin sum[0] <= temp[0][7:0]; sum[1] <= temp[0][15:8] + temp[1][7:0]; sum[2] <= sum[1] + temp[1][15:8]; sum[3] <= sum[2] + temp[2][7:0]; sum[4] <= sum[3] + temp[2][15:8]; sum[5] <= sum[4] + temp[3][7:0]; sum[6] <= sum[5] + temp[3][15:8]; sum[7] <= sum[6] + temp[4][7:0]; sum[8] <= sum[7] + temp[4][15:8]; sum[9] <= sum[8] + temp[5][7:0]; sum[10] <= sum[9] + temp[5][15:8]; sum[11] <= sum[10] + temp[6][7:0]; sum[12] <= sum[11] + temp[6][15:8]; sum[13] <= sum[12] + temp[7][7:0]; sum[14] <= sum[13] + temp[7][15:8]; sum[15] <= temp[0][7:0]; end

Calculate the final product.

always @(posedge clk) begin mul_out_reg <= sum[15:0]; end

Assign the output.

assign mul_out = mul_en_out ? mul_out_reg : 16'b0;
